Full breakdown

mock mode: Mock mode is available as the deterministic fallback path.

supabase config: Supabase public URL and anon key are present.

auth session: You're not signed in. Work is saving on this device only.

areas: Sign in to check the areas saved to your account.

capture persistence: Sign in to check the captures saved to your account.

AI parser: AI parser is not configured in Phase 4E; parsing remains deterministic mock logic.

Google Calendar: Google Calendar is not configured; planning remains local-only.

Observability privacy: Replay, autocapture, AI content tracing, and vendor telemetry remain disabled.

Sentry: Sentry DSN is absent; sanitized error export is disabled.

PostHog: PostHog public config is absent; manual product analytics is disabled.

Langfuse: langfuse is disabled; vendor telemetry stays off by default.
